ops.title: Fix golangci-lint failures on main (lint CI job red, pre-existing)
ops.description: The lint job (golangci-lint v9) fails on main and predates round 3 (already red on run 48e30d27). Plan: run golangci-lint locally with the CI config, triage every finding — fix real issues, tune config only for genuine noise, never contort code to satisfy the checker (house rule). Gate: the lint job green on a real push.

ops.text: lint job concludes success on a push to main
